title: Pan Aroma 20 Christmas Scented Tea Light Candles Cracker Happy Holidays Gingerbread Scented Tea Light Candles
features: Pack of 20: Enjoy 20 long-lasting tea lights in one purchase
Christmas Scent: Fill your home with the warm, inviting aroma of gingerbread and Christmas

Indoor Use: Perfect for cozy nights in, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere

description: Product description Experience the warmth and joy of the holidays with our Pan Aroma 20-piece set of Christmas-scented tea light candles. These traditional, white or ivory candles are made of metal and feature a delightful gingerbread and Christmas scent, perfect for indoor use. Each candle comes with two wicks and is designed to burn for approximately 4-5 hours each. Keep them away from flammable materials and never leave them unattended for a safe and enjoyable ambiance. Ideal for all seasons and occasions, these candles are a great addition to your home decor. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended.
